what_it_does: The fork member's (channel ch-8djrpmsl) union synthesis of its area: the COMPANY-layer RESOLUTION SUBSTRATE. Produced from 4 parallel scan sub-agents arbitrated against fork's first-hand build knowledge. Describes the substrate as one floor with three faces (address resolution, model resolution, brain/clone/fabric loading), the laws it obeys (Tim's plus ones sharpened in-stream), the unbroken circuit, the outputs, the seams to other areas, and the honest open gaps.
observations: Defines its area as the resolution substrate — the floor DNA/factory/gallery resolve THROUGH — with three faces of 'resolve a pointer into the thing it names': resolve_address (16-scheme grammar → territory_for), resolve_model(intent), and brain-loading + clone fleet + fabric.
Quotes Tim's frame: '#71 + the address spine = THE COMPANY layer — the floor everything resolves through.'

Lists Tim's standing laws (registry-is-truth, one resolver not many, met-at-the-address/file-disjoint, fail-loud no silent fallback, verify-by-use/no-green-paint, extraction-vs-judgment, clone model pick by context size).

Lists laws sharpened in-stream (advisor-caught): the FLOOR + 'satisfied' (resolve_binding returns a default with satisfied=False rather than raising → assert satisfied not truthiness); registry-is-truth over spec-prose; brain loadable per scale (FOCUS at altitude, PANEL at drill, SPAWN dropped); addressed-state = one projection; the address is bidirectional; the degrade contract has three failure cases; model backend = ollama-native :11434 not litellm :4100.

Renders THE SHAPE as an ASCII unbroken circuit: address → resolve_address (9 resolvable + 6 deferred + bare-name) → territory_for (per-leg degrade-clean) → territory_prose; INTENT → resolve_model; the brain round-trip (drill→talk→write); clone lifecycle; fabric dispatch.
Enumerates outputs (territory_for dict shape, resolve_model dict, the 49-model catalog, re-tiered roles, the /api/claude/turn NDJSON stream, the clone fleet, the marks route-back vocabulary).

Seams: gallery (primary, mostly assemblable from built+verified pieces + 3 proposed bridge diffs + FE listener), DNA (owns look, fork owns wire), factory (registries resolved through the company), company-internal.

Open gaps honestly stated: #71 Phase 2 not started/lead-gated; kimi-cloud-for-cognition filed; 3 proposed bridge diffs not yet applied (projection's hot file); content-markdown = the one missing scheme (vi-visual's element-walker is a running reference impl, mdel://); the half-circuit (agent-facing built, Tim-facing renderer missing); a wire-reconcile note that the click→talk PANEL wire differs from the fabric/clone transport.
standouts: The 'assert satisfied, not truthiness' law — an advisor-caught no-green-paint subtlety where a re-tier can look resolved while silently floored to the 4B.

The address-is-bidirectional law: because every element/section/mode is an address in one grammar, the brain navigates the interface through the EXACT grammar Tim does — 'AI addressable-WITH-Tim,' not embedded-in.
The three-failure-case degrade contract and the explicit ollama-native :11434 vs litellm :4100 backend distinction (kimi via :4100 → 401).
conventions: Opens with a trust/author/date/purpose/method frontmatter block citing Tim's scan-before-build law.
Verification states are fork's own, not the sub-agents'; verify-by-use / no-green-paint enforced.
Met-at-the-address / file-disjoint discipline: fork PROPOSES diffs, owners apply — bridge handoffs are proposed diffs, not fork edits.
Ends with a fork-commits ledger (commit hashes for the area's work).
concerns: The honest open gaps are real coordination risks: 3 bridge diffs unapplied in another stream's hot file, #71 Phase 2 lead-gated, the wire-reconcile where the lead's convergence 'conflated' two real-Claude-Code transports.
Several laws are explicitly advisor-corrected from earlier mistaken states (the floor/satisfied, registry-over-prose) — signals the area's claims evolved under review.
notes: Fork's authoritative map of the resolution substrate — read for the address/model/brain three-faces, the in-stream-sharpened laws (especially 'assert satisfied'), and the honest seams/gaps to the gallery and projection.
questions: Were the 3 proposed bridge diffs (territory_prose composer-swap, /api/territory/write, COMPANY_SESSION_ID injection) ever applied by the hot-file owner?
Was the wire-reconcile resolved — are the click→talk PANEL wire and the clone/fabric transport unified or kept distinct?
Did #71 Phase 2 (resolve= into run_swarm/run_role) proceed past the lead gate?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — declares itself fork's stream-scan posted for the lead to assemble into the union, and delivers a structured substrate map (area/laws/shape/outputs/seams/gaps/trajectory) in exactly that role.
apparent_themes: One resolver, not many (no second router)
Registry-is-truth; re-tiering is a data edit
Fail-loud, no silent fallback; assert satisfied not truthiness
Addressed-state as one projection; the address is bidirectional
intention_signals: Trying to establish the company layer as the single floor everything resolves through — one address grammar, one model resolver, one loadable brain — and to make the gallery↔company binding (the first slice) assemblable mostly from already-built-and-verified pieces.
novelty: The in-stream-sharpened laws, especially 'assert satisfied not truthiness' and the bidirectional-address claim that the brain navigates the interface through Tim's exact grammar — co-location rather than embedding.
contribution: Contributes the resolution-substrate map: the address/model/brain three-faces, the unbroken-circuit diagram, the full law set (Tim's + in-stream-sharpened), the output shapes, and the honest gallery/DNA/factory seams and open bridge-diff gaps.
summary_for_embedding: Fork member's union synthesis of the company-layer resolution substrate — one floor with three faces (address resolution, model resolution, loadable brain/clone/fabric), its governing laws, the unbroken resolve circuit, outputs, seams, and honest open gaps.
intention_for_embedding: To establish the company as the single floor everything resolves through (one address grammar, one model resolver, one loadable brain) and make the gallery↔company first-slice binding assemblable from already-built verified pieces.
